title: Criminal Complaints: Mr. Kavin Phongpandecha
text:
Mr. Kavin Phongpandecha, a former Chief Executive Officer of Bitazza Company Limited ("Bitazza") was responsible for the operation of Bitazza during the relevant period. His order or action resulted in Bitazza’s offence regarding the digital asset dealer without a license owing to providing a service known as "Crypto Dust" and joint providing the product known as "Freedom Card" with Freedomverse Company Limited. Accordingly, Mr. Kavin shall also be liable for the penalties as provided for Bitazza’s offence.

Outcome: This case is in the process of inquiry by the inquiry official
relevant_law: 94 in conjunction with 26 and 83 of the Penal Code / DAB Act
name: Mr. Kavin Phongpandecha
